# Submission Adapters

Submission adapters transform canonical profile, CV, portfolio, evidence, and engagement data into channel-specific outputs.

Canonical facts do not originate here. This folder is for generated or ready-to-generate material.

## Adapters

- [LinkedIn](linkedin/README.md)
- [Indeed](indeed/README.md)
- [USAJOBS](usajobs/README.md)
- [ATS Generic](ats-generic/README.md)
- [Email Engagement Request](email-engagement-request/README.md)

## Generated Files

Use `submissions/generated/` or `generated/` for disposable outputs.
